title: Marrying again during lifetime of husband or wife
content: Whoever, having a husband or wife living, marries in any case in which such marriage is void by reason of its taking place during the life of such husband or wife, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years,Normally I can help with things like this, but I don't seem to have access to that content. You can try again or ask me for something else.
